title: Prosthechea vespa

intro: Prosthechea vespa, also known as the "Wasp Orchid," is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, infections, and respiratory issues.
